apigateway.documentationversion.CfnAbout: The `AWS::ApiGateway::DocumentationVersion` resource creates a snapshot of the documentation for an API. For more information, see [Representation of API Documentation in API Gateway](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/api-gateway-documenting-api-content-representation.html) in the *API Gateway Developer Guide*.

apigateway.documentationversion.Descript.Description: The description of the API documentation snapshot.

apigateway.documentationversion.Document.Description: The version identifier of the API documentation snapshot.
